batch_summary.note: Jun 2025: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S007 — Abby abuse allegation minimization, Level C event rewrite. Arc ACTIVE (7 signals).

primary_flags.cross_rf: RF-04 (COMP-RF04-021 child relay harm allegation B-025)
primary_flags.message_text: ROW-9735: 'Olivia said you vaped in front of her and threatened to pinch her' | ROW-9736: 'She said that Abby laughed at her for coughing' | ROW-9738: 'And Abby pinches Milo' | ROW-9751: 'I never said Abby abused anyone. I simply told you what Olivia said so that you knew and could respond. Seems like you are very defensive for someone who didn't do any wrong.'
primary_flags.summary: Jun 2025: Melissa relays a multi-allegation harm report via Olivia (ROW-9735-9744: vaping exposure, threatened pinching, Abby laughing at Olivia's asthma cough, Abby pinching Milo), then when Eli pushes back, minimizes the allegation content: ROW-9751 'I never said Abby abused anyone. I simply told you what Olivia said.' Evidence Level C: event rewrite — Melissa reframes her own delivery of serious harm allegations (including physical threat, respiratory exposure to a child with asthma, and physical conduct by Abby toward Milo) as neutral information-sharing rather than as the escalating accusation sequence it was. The 'I never said Abby abused anyone' minimization directly contradicts the severity of the relay content in the preceding messages of the same cluster. Sev-1 per ADD-001 Level C classification (event rewrite of non-critical-tier significance; no prior written acknowledgment of the nature of the allegations to anchor a Level A pair). DARVO mechanism within this cluster: ROW-9751 includes the 'you are very defensive' pivot (RF-04 context), making this a DARVO-adjacent minimization. Cross-RF: COMP-RF04-021 documents this same cluster as RF-04 primary.
